abilities.description: Put a loyalty counter on each red planeswalker you control.

effect.description: Put a loyalty counter on each red planeswalker you control.
effect.name: PutCounterAll

abilities.description: Create two 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.
You may cast target instant or sorcery card with mana cost 3 or less from your graveyard. If that card would be put into your graveyard this turn, exile it instead.

effect.description: You may cast target instant or sorcery card with mana cost 3 or less from your graveyard. If that card would be put into your graveyard this turn, exile it instead.
effect.name: Play

abilities.target_prompt: Select target instant or sorcery card with mana cost 3 or less
